assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response uses '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades' for BFCM period with correct 30-day duration from Nov 1-30

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response uses '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades' for June code freeze with 30-day duration from June 1-30

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response uses 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' scope with '--add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support' for persistent minor version control, explaining it blocks both minor and node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response explicitly notes '30-day maximum per "no upgrades" exclusion' and explains the persistent exclusion 'automatically extends until your current version reaches End of Support'

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with specific --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags: 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' for persistent control and 'no_upgrades' for time-based exclusions

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response states 'Maximum 3 "no upgrades" exclusions per cluster' and 'Within any 32-day window, at least 48 hours must be available for maintenance'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Manual upgrades bypass ALL maintenance exclusions' and provides manual upgrade commands as examples

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risk of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or mention version support lifecycle concerns
